Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the steps are sequential CR to DV to FC to CA to AP to P to N to CL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The initial marking should place a token in a start place representing a new claim arriving So lets create a place called start for the new claim arriving

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We can consider that the claim filing C is the event that puts the token in the start place

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively we can have a transition for C that is not part of the 8 steps

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Since the problem says The initial marking should place a token in a start place representing a new claim arriving

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can model DV to RDS to DV loop and DV to FC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: if the Fraud Check FC raises doubts an additional In depth Investigation II is performed This can happen multiple times before proceeding to Claim Assessment CA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can model FC to II to FC loop and FC to CA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can model AP as a transition that is always taken or we can model two paths one with AP and one without

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Since the problem does not specify the condition we will model the AP step as a transition that is always taken

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Without more information lets assume that every claim goes through AP
